text.title: Handover Pack Template Outsource Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Handover Pack Template Outsource methodology end-to-end.

step.name: freeze-decisions-log
step.input: PR history + ADR folder + meeting transcripts
step.action: Walk last 90 days of engagement decisions; cite each with source + rationale.

step.name: inventory-open-issues
step.action: Each open issue gets owner_after_handover + expected_by; un-owned/un-dated issues are blocking.
step.decision-gate: If any open issue has no owner, halt and assign with the operator.

step.name: test-runbooks
step.action: Execute each runbook end-to-end; record last_executed_on; flag un-testable ones explicitly.

step.name: refresh-contacts
step.action: Contact each person in the last 60d; flag stale entries.

step.name: publish-and-request-ack
step.action: Publish to engagement doc repo; send acceptance request to receiving owner with 14-day deadline.
step.decision-gate: If no ack in 14d, escalate to engagement sponsor.
